svg.title: Representative egocentric AI milestones
svg.desc: A generated milestone poster for Awesome Egocentric Atlas, showing 18 representative field-defining works from 2009-2026, grouped into era bands with uncropped visual panels.
svg.text: Representative works grouped by the shifts they created: egocentric data, scale, reasoning, robotics, and world models.
